99.99% Pure Copper Bullion

6 sizes · 4 bundle tiers

Copper is the metal civilisation runs on. Every EV needs 83kg of it. Every offshore wind turbine needs 4 tonnes. Global demand is structurally rising while new mine supply lags by years.


Our copper bars are 99.99% pure. Available in six sizes from 500g to 10kg, with significant discounts for volume buyers. Bundle pricing shown as total order value.

What You Get

Every order. No exceptions.
01 · The Physical Bar
999 Fine Metal.
Individually Sealed.

Every bar is 999 fine purity — the same grade used in industrial and research applications. Each piece is finished with a matte satin surface and individually sealed in clear protective wrapping before vault storage. The finish is clean, precise, and tactile.

MIRROR POLISH UPGRADE

A high-polish mirror finish is available on request — note it in your order and we will quote a small per-bar charge before proceeding. Mirror finish requires additional processing time.

02 · Laser Hallmark
Every Bar Identified.
Permanently.

Each bar carries a laser-engraved hallmark including the atomic number, chemical symbol, purity designation, exact weight, and unique serial number. The mark is permanent, precise, and tamper-evident. No two bars are identical.

${['Atomic Number','Chemical Symbol','999FINE Purity','Exact Weight','Serial Number','Element Name'].map(m => `
✓ ${m}
` ).join('')}
03 · Certificate of Ownership
Your Legal Proof.
Immediately Tradeable.

A formally issued Certificate of Ownership is generated at the time of your order. It lists every serial number allocated to your Customer Reference, the vault location, and the legal terms of your allocated ownership. This certificate constitutes your proof of title and can be traded or transferred immediately — the serial numbers are yours from the moment payment clears.

04 · Serial Numbers
Public Registry.
Permanent Record.

Every serial number is recorded in our public serial registry the moment your order is confirmed — before your bars are even created. Serials are in the format Cu-26-1000-0001. They appear on the physical bar, on your certificate, and in the registry. Anyone can verify authenticity against the public record.

05 · Vault Storage
6 Months Free.
Refinery of Origin.

Your metal is held at the refinery of origin — fully allocated, individually identified, and third-party audited. No freight decision is required at checkout. Your metal is yours from day one, safely stored, for 6 months at no charge. Arrange delivery whenever you're ready — your forwarder or ours.

06 · Your Identity & Privacy
Known Only to Us.
Never to Anyone Else.

A fundamental Know Your Customer verification is required to register your ownership. We collect your legal name, contact details, residential address, and one identity document — either a government-issued photo ID or a bank statement linking your name to your address.

Your identity is stored in a private internal system only. Your Customer Reference Number — not your name — is your public identity on the serial registry. Your personal details are never disclosed to any third party except as required by applicable law or regulatory authority. Ever.

07 · Transfer of Ownership
Trade Freely.
Register Immediately.

Your serial numbers are freely tradeable from the moment of issue. You may sell or transfer them to any party at any time. However — any change of ownership must be registered with us immediately while the metal remains in our custody.

The last registered owner in our records is the only party who has standing to access, direct, or take delivery of the metal. A new Certificate of Ownership is issued to the incoming owner upon completion of their KYC. The outgoing certificate is rendered void. We bear no liability for unregistered transfers.

Why Physical Metals?

01
Critical supply chains, physical scarcity
Tantalum, Niobium, and Molybdenum are not mined at scale anywhere. A handful of countries control most global output. Unlike gold, you can't print more, and you can't substitute them out of the products that need them.
02
Demand is structural, not speculative
EVs, renewable grids, AI data centres, satellites — every major growth industry for the next 30 years runs on these metals. The demand curve is locked in. Supply isn't keeping up.
03
999 grade. You own the atom.
Every bar is 999 purity. No ETF counterparty risk. No paper claims. Serial numbers and certificates of authenticity are issued at the moment of purchase and recorded in our public registry.
